title: adiantum fragile var. rigidulum
intro: Adiantum fragile var. rigidulum, also known as Maidenhair Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Adiantaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Adiantum fragile var. rigidulum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
